description_long: This is a medium-sized, industrial locomotive painted in a faded magenta color with pale green railings and black undercarriage. The front features a prominent V-shaped yellow stripe, dual headlights, and a sturdy metal bumper. The side view reveals a single cab with two large rectangular windows and a door, as well as a series of vented panels and a visible serial number 'TFM238-661'. The train rides on six large metal wheels, with visible suspension and undercarriage details. The roof is flat with a raised cab section and a vented compartment at the rear. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, diesel-powered freight or shunting locomotive commonly found in urban rail yards or industrial zones.
description: A magenta industrial locomotive with pale green railings, black undercarriage, and a single cab with large windows and vented side panels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the V-shaped yellow stripe, dual headlights, and robust metal bumper.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the cab with two large windows, a door, vented panels, and the serial number 'TFM238-661'.
description_view_2: Alternate front view highlighting the symmetrical window arrangement and the raised cab roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with similar features to view 1, showing the wheels, railings, and rear compartment.
attribute_door_placement: single door on one side of the cab
attribute_window_arrangement: two large rectangular windows on each side of the cab
